archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Command Center Variant)
visual_mood: Premium Tactical SaaS. Deep slate canvas with glowing neon cyan and emerald green accents. High contrast, scan-first, highly functional. Feels like a logistics mission control.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Control Room Grid Protocol. Dense, functional, strict hierarchy.
spacing_and_layout.gap_strategy: gap-4 for dense widget clusters, gap-6 for macro section separation.
spacing_and_layout.padding: p-4 or p-6 inside cards to maximize data density while preserving readability.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-lg (8px) for cards and containers. Sharp enough for a technical feel, soft enough to be modern.

page_structure.sidebar: Fixed width 256px (hidden on mobile, off-canvas menu), pure #020617 background, border-r border-slate-800.
page_structure.top_navbar: Sticky top, h-16, backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/80, border-b border-slate-800.
page_structure.main_content: pt-16 pl-0 md:pl-64 min-h-screen bg-slate-950 text-slate-50.

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-slate-950 font-bold px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,211,238,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 border border-slate-700 text-slate-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-500 text-slate-300 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-all

tables.style: Shadcn UI table, highly dense. bg-slate-900, border-collapse, border border-slate-800.
tables.header: bg-slate-950 text-slate-400 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider sticky top-0

upload_dropzone.style: border-2 border-dashed border-slate-700 hover:border-cyan-500 bg-slate-900/50 hover:bg-slate-900 transition-all rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer min-h-[400px]

charts.tooltip: Custom tooltip with bg-slate-900, border border-slate-700, text-slate-100 shadow-xl

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle border color shifts (slate-800 to slate-600) and slight transform (-translate-y-[1px]) for interactive cards.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: All state changes should use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
interactions_and_motion.loading: Use skeleton loaders (animate-pulse bg-slate-800) matching the exact dimensions of the expected content.

media_and_icons.icon_style: weight="duotone" for nav and decorative, weight="bold" for functional actions.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark tactical grid with glowing cyan nodes. Use this as a very subtle, low-opacity (opacity-10 or 20) absolute background behind the initial Upload Dropzone to make the empty state feel premium and technical.

setup: Install required fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono (Google Fonts).
Install lucide-react (if not present) as fallback, but prefer Phosphor.
Configure Tailwind config with the specified slate, cyan, and emerald color palettes.
Ensure all routes (Dashboard, Inventory Health, Stockout Risks, Recommendations, Reports, Settings) are established using react-router-dom.
state_management: The app MUST start in an 'Empty State'. No data should be visible. The main view should exclusively show the Upload Dropzone.
Implement a mock file upload flow: User clicks/drags file -> simulate 2s loading with progress bar -> set global state 'isDataLoaded' to true.
Once 'isDataLoaded' is true, reveal the full Dashboard with all KPIs, Charts, Alerts, and Tables.
component_implementation: KPI Cards (5): Must be a 5-column grid on desktop (grid-cols-5). Use IBM Plex Mono for the giant metric numbers.

Charts Section (5 charts): Layout in a bento grid. Top row: City-wise Bar (col-span-2), Risk Pie (col-span-1), Top Risky SKUs (col-span-2). Bottom row: Quantity Line (col-span-3), Lead Time vs Inventory Days (col-span-2).
Recommendations Table: Implement search input, filter dropdowns (Risk Level), and pagination. Ensure the header is sticky. Add a 'Risk Badge' column (Red/Amber/Green).

AI Reasoning Cards: Within the table (perhaps as an expandable row or a side drawer), show the 'AI Reasoning' for the recommendation using the defined 'ai_reasoning_panel' style. It should look like LLM-generated text (e.g., 'Demand spiked 40% in BLR-01. Lead time is 3 days. Recommend sending 500 units immediately.').
Critical Alerts Panel: Stacked cards on the right side or top of the dashboard using the critical_alerts red tint style.

Use Shadcn UI components extensively (Card, Table, Badge, Button, Input, Select, Dialog) but override their default white/light borders with the slate-900/slate-800 dark theme definitions provided here.
testing_and_accessibility: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='download-ro-btn').
Contrast must be high: use slate-50 for primary text, slate-400 for secondary text on slate-900 backgrounds.
